title: The Fed - April 28-29, 2026 FOMC Meeting
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: The Federal Reserve held its FOMC meeting on April 28-29, 2026, with Chair Powell delivering the opening statement on April 29. The meeting concluded with a pre
excerpt: The Federal Reserve held its FOMC meeting on April 28-29, 2026, with Chair Powell delivering the opening statement on April 29. The meeting concluded with a press conference. The Federal Reserve's decisions and statements were released on April 29, 2026.

content.introduction: The Federal Reserve held its FOMC meeting on April 28-29, 2026, with Chair Powell delivering the opening statement on April 29. The meeting concluded with a press conference. The Federal Reserve's decisions and statements were released on April 29, 2026.
